title: SECTION 1.1. Purpose
text: The Rules and Regulations of the Board are set forth for the purpose of interpreting and implementing the Architects' Registration Law.
source_note: The provisions of this §1.1 adopted to be effective March 17, 1988, 13 TexReg 1137; amended to be effective March 6, 2003, 28 TexReg 1864
